text.tspan: lunedì 13 luglio 2026 alle ore 23:17 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

The fixed A/B/C cluster scope excludes clustered multipart and conditional/versioned writes, erasure-coded transfer/reconstruction, dynamic membership and certificate lifecycle, prepared-artifact intents, automated orphan cleanup, rebalance, broad or periodic anti-entropy discovery, and broader partition behavior. Single-node features and pure placement planning do not supply these cluster behaviors.
